goal: Expose and wire the approved Phase 1 query tools with deterministic results, freshness and coverage metadata, and shipped docs plus test parity for the local-only extension and daemon architecture.
summary: Committed slice b7fe5c9eaa8d8194011555960e7a86b1743526f5 adds the approved Phase 1 tool surface, daemon query contracts with deterministic metadata and caps, healthy-repo tool activation gating, README operator guidance, and deterministic structural/basic tool coverage.
